reservations.reservation: Unanimous consent must be enforced by code before it is treated as constitutional canon.
mitigation: Ship vote-mode + blocker-packet validation behind config + env override first.
reservations.what_to_watch: Any motion ratified without required role votes or without blocker packets on NO.

votes.rationale: Approve the direction; implementation is the next execution step.
The process adds structured friction and preserves objections; deadlock protocol prevents paralysis.
Ratify as constitutional intent; enforce via runner changes next.
